hindi: जय राम श्रीराम जय राम रामम्, जय राम सीतेश सुराभिरामम्।
english: Victory to Ram, Shri Ram, victory to Ram, Ram; victory to Ram, lord of Sita, beautiful to the gods
roman: Jaya Rama Shri Rama jaya Rama Ramam jaya Rama Sitesha surabhiramam

hindi: जय राम श्रीराम जय राम रामम्, भजे सदा रामम् रघुराम रामम्॥
english: Victory to Ram, Shri Ram, victory to Ram; I always worship Ram, the Raghu-Ram
roman: Jaya Rama Shri Rama jaya Rama Ramam bhaje sada Ramam Raghu Rama Ramam

hindi: राम नाम परम धाम, राम नाम सत्यस्वरूप।
english: The name of Ram is the supreme abode, the name of Ram is the embodiment of truth
roman: Rama nama param dhama Rama nama satya svarupa

hindi: राम नाम निरन्तर जपो, राम नाम अमृत रूप॥
english: Chant the name of Ram continuously, the name of Ram is the form of nectar
roman: Rama nama nirantar japo Rama nama amrita rupa

hindi: राम चन्द्र कृपालु भज मन, हरण भव भय दारुणम्।
english: Worship in the mind Ram Chandra the merciful, who removes the terrible fear of worldly existence
roman: Rama chandra kripaloo bhaja mana harana bhava bhaya darunam

hindi: नवकञ्ज लोचन कञ्ज मुख कर, कञ्ज पद कञ्जारुणम्॥
english: Lotus-eyed, lotus-faced, lotus-handed, lotus-footed, reddish as lotuses
roman: Nava kanja lochana kanja mukha kara kanja pada kanjaarunam

english: Whoever reads this Rama Tandava Stotram with devotion always
roman: Rama tandava stotram idam yah pathed bhaktitah sada

english: Beholding Rama always, one attains the state of Rama
roman: Rama malokayan nityam Ramasya padam apnuyat
